title: lsktp
description: This is a main server mod that does not require an OP to teleport players to specified coordinates.
body:
This is a main server mod that does not require an OP to teleport players to specified coordinates. It can be better compatible with the world map and minimap on the Integration Pack server, and can also be used for extreme mode/cheat-free survival teleportation. After adding it to the server, the client does not need to add this module. The command /lsktp x y z can be used to teleport, and Xaero maps can be adapted to the command by adjusting the configuration.
If you need more versions, please go to our github link and submit an issue.

# Chinese version.中文版
这是一个不需要 OP 也能传送玩家到指定坐标的主服务端模组。
可以在整合包服务器上更好的兼容世界地图与小地图，也可用于极限模式/无作弊生存的传送。
在添加至服务端后客户端无需添加此模组。
使用命令 /lsktp x y z 即可传送，Xaero 系地图可通过调整配。
如果您需要更多的版本，请去我们的github链接提交issue。
